title: Aarstiderne Campaign
description: Designed the campaign website and campaign material for Aarstiderne affiliate campaign at Adservice.
problem: Aarstiderne, an advertiser working with the affiliate company Adservice, wanted to generate more leads. The plan was to channel that demand through Adservice's gamification concept, LeadPlatform.
challenge: Adservice is an affiliate company that connects advertisers and publishers. Aarstiderne was one of our advertisers which wanted to generate more leads through our gamification concept "LeadPlatform".
solution: A campaign website and campaign material were designed resulting in 10.000+ visitiors and and a 17%+ conversion rate.

process.body: Shaped Aarstiderne's offer to fit the LeadPlatform gamification concept so the campaign could capture leads through an interactive experience.
Designed the campaign website and supporting marketing material, on-brand and built on the design system.
Took the campaign live to drive traffic and turn visitors into qualified leads.
